title: Red Snapper in Indian-Style Butter Sauce
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish where red snapper is cooked in a rich and creamy butter sauce, inspired by Indian cuisine.
instructions: Season the red snapper fillets with salt and pepper on both sides.
Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the red chili powder and garam masala powder to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the red snapper fillets to the skillet, skin side up, and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the skin is crispy.
Flip the fillets over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until cooked through.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 5-7 minutes, until the fish is cooked to your liking.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
